column1: Next steps: what is the experience of students from a care background in education?
Audience: 2022 applicants who shared that they were care-experienced in their UCAS application and were below the age of 25    Domicile: UK
Coverage: All survey respondents who agreed that the care experienced description applied to them
Survey responses are weighted to represent the entire sample population.
Percentages are rounded to the nearest whole number.
Have your chosen universities and colleges contacted you to tell you more about their support and policies for care-experienced students?
Yes – all of my choices have contacted me
Yes – one or more of my choices have contacted me
No – none of my choices have contacted me
